response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong individual contributor with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to agentic tooling, but he is fundamentally misaligned with a CTO role. There is no evidence of people management, team scaling, or engineering leadership at any level — his entire career is as a Staff or Senior Software Developer. His AI/agent experience is limited to a few months at his current role (April 2025) and described only in vague terms. He has no demonstrated fintech infrastructure depth, no experience operating AI systems in regulated environments, and no track record of executive-level technical leadership or board communication.
strengths: Broad polyglot background spanning distributed systems, embedded, mobile, and web — indicates strong technical adaptability
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq shows awareness of the space
Experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic with high-throughput microservices handling millions of HTTP requests/second demonstrates real production distributed systems work
concerns: Zero people management or team-scaling experience — no evidence of ever leading, hiring, or developing engineers
Agentic AI experience is superficial and extremely recent (< 2 months as of resume date), with no production multi-agent systems at scale
No fintech infrastructure depth in credit systems, risk modeling, payment flows, or compliance — RIDE Capital exposure was as an individual contributor only
